---
id: post-v-1-companies-company-id-contractor-payment-groups-preview

description: "Preview a group of contractor payments. Request will validate inputs and return preview of the contractor payment group including the expected debit_date.  Uuid will be null in the response."
sidebar_label: "Preview a contractor payment group"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Preview a contractor payment group"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/companies/{company_id}/contractor_payment_groups/preview"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Preview a group of contractor payments. Request will validate inputs and return preview of the contractor payment group including the expected debit_date.  Uuid will be null in the response.
The returned creation_token is a required parameter in order to create the contractor payment group.

scope: `payrolls:read`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
